qualified_inference: The tested Codex host loaded the Beta defaultPrompt but did not inject the packaged SessionStart passive Kernel into the Generator context.

contract_effect.reason: The required passive carrier capability is absent; changing the carrier or arm is outside aggregate adapter correction and requires a successor design.

claim_boundary.proven: The current SessionStart-based thin-Kernel implementation is not active on the tested Codex surface.
not_proven: The thin-Kernel product idea can never work through another Codex-supported carrier.
Direct owner routing is better or worse than Stable.
